reviews.review_description: This game is trash asl and pissed I can’t get my money back. There is only 2 levels, no advancing…no nothing. I don’t even understand how this scam even made the cut. Imma try everything in my power to get my money back cause I literally bought nothing to play😡

An app where you have to find physical cyber security threats in an office, and sort dangerous emails in a gamified way. It's fun to demo and play with others to compete,  but clearly designed more for real training than for "gamers". My one critique is that it could be a bit longer.
